creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
I would like to update deskutils/fet to 5.18.2 with the attached patch.  Could 
you please review it and give your approval?

Build log available here:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20121024113200-13169/

Changes:
- Update to 5.18.2
- Trim Makefile header
- Don't use name of port in COMMENT
- Move LICENSE to correct location (and is GPLv2 or greater)
- Convert to new options framework
- Add NLS option to install translations

-- 
Jason E. Hale - jhale@
FreeBSD Ports Committer
KDE/FreeBSD Team
